final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing movie poster for "大话西游" reimagined in 1990s Hong Kong cinema style, featuring Zhizunbao and Zixia embracing on a city wall.

Style/medium: 1990s Hong Kong film poster, film grain texture, analog photographic aesthetic
Composition: foreground couple embracing on ancient city wall parapet, two distant figures standing apart in the background, vertical poster layout
Subject: Zhizunbao (至尊宝) and Zixia (紫霞) locked in a kiss/embrace on the city wall in the foreground; Niu Mojing (牛魔王) and Tang Seng (唐僧) standing silhouetted in the far background
Scene/backdrop: ancient Chinese city wall at dusk or night, atmospheric haze
Lighting/mood: moody, melancholic, romantic — warm amber and cool shadow contrast typical of 90s HK cinema
Color palette: faded warm amber, dusty rose, deep shadow blacks, slightly desaturated as if color-graded on 35mm film
Materials/textures: heavy film grain overlay, slight halation around light sources, worn poster print texture
Text (verbatim): 大话西游
Constraints: vertical poster orientation, film grain must be visible, 90s HK movie poster typography and layout conventions
Avoid: modern CGI look, clean digital sharpness, contemporary color grading, generic fantasy poster aesthetic
